shaderTarget.skslScope: Skia API compatibility facade only; no dynamic SkSL compilation.
shaderTarget.runtimeEffectSupport: Registered Kanvas descriptor with Kotlin CPU behavior and parser-validated WGSL GPU module.

entryPoints.name: pipelinePmBundle
entryPoints.purpose: Builds the portable PM dashboard/report bundle including M88.

entryPoints.name: pipelineSceneDashboardGate
entryPoints.purpose: Validates the generated scene dashboard support/refusal contract.

entryPoints.name: Kadre live demo tasks
entryPoints.purpose: Remain the native/runtime demo shell for PM-facing live evidence.

nonGoals: No SkSL compiler, SkSL IR, or SkSL VM; WGSL is the shader implementation target.
No arbitrary Skia/SkSL runtime shader input support.
No release-grade windowed FPS gate in RC2.

requiredCorrectnessGates.name: pipelineSceneDashboardGate
requiredCorrectnessGates.rationale: Dashboard must have zero fail/tracked-gap rows and stable expected-unsupported reasons.

requiredCorrectnessGates.name: pipelinePmBundle
requiredCorrectnessGates.rationale: Portable PM bundle must copy and validate M65-M88 evidence without resolving unpublished Kadre runtime dependencies.

requiredCorrectnessGates.name: :kadre-runtime:pipelineM88ReleaseCandidate2
requiredCorrectnessGates.rationale: RC2 source generation remains useful locally, but headless CI package validation must use checked-in artifacts when Kadre is not provisioned.

performanceGates.name: pipelinePerformanceReleaseGate
performanceGates.rationale: Existing selected measured rows remain release-blocking.

performanceGates.name: m84 frame.kadre-windowed
performanceGates.rationale: Native timing is serialized but not counted as a release gate.

performanceGates.name: m85 resource/cache ledger
performanceGates.rationale: Deterministic resource ledger is not observed runtime cache telemetry.

quarantinePolicy: Adapter/host mismatch quarantines frame results instead of silently failing RC2.
Estimated or missing metrics never count as measured evidence.
Missing native Kadre setup is dependency-gated for local demos, not an opaque pipelinePmBundle failure.

categories.summary: Rows with CPU/GPU/reference or descriptor parity artifacts.
categories.pmMeaning: The selected row is supported inside its documented bounds.
categories.nextAction: Protect with dashboard gate and avoid broadening the claim without new evidence.

categories.summary: Rows intentionally refused with stable fallback reasons.
categories.pmMeaning: The limitation is known, intentional, and visible rather than a hidden failure.
categories.nextAction: Promote only when a CPU/GPU/reference route and diff evidence exist.

categories.summary: Font shaping/color emoji/codec breadth depends on real dependencies, not substitutes.
categories.pmMeaning: The feature should wait for the real dependency or upstream-quality delivery.
categories.nextAction: Track dependency status; do not add short-lived substitutes to clear the row.

categories.summary: Broad Path AA, image-filter DAG, layers, display-list replay, runtime effects, and texture/image support remain incomplete.
categories.pmMeaning: The family has useful selected evidence but is not product-complete.
categories.nextAction: Open feature tickets with before/after artifacts instead of changing thresholds.

categories.summary: M84 native timing, M85 deterministic cache ledger, and selected live-edit telemetry are evidence but not release-grade broad gates.
categories.pmMeaning: The data is useful for decisions but does not block release yet.
categories.nextAction: Promote to release gate only after variance, adapter, and cache telemetry policy are accepted.

stableRefusals.summary: M87/M88 refuse arbitrary Skia/SkSL runtime shader input because Kanvas targets registered descriptors plus WGSL, not dynamic SkSL compilation.
Runtime effects need registered WGSL descriptors for GPU support.
Real device-loss recovery is not claimed in RC2.
Broad display-list text replay is not claimed in RC2.
Broad display-list image-filter replay is not claimed in RC2.

pmTriage.rcMepAction: Keep visible as expected-unsupported until bounded DAG replay has CPU/GPU/diff evidence.
Do not use placeholder glyphs as support; wait for real font/glyph delivery.
Promote only registered Kanvas descriptors backed by parser-validated WGSL.
Keep candidate until windowed variance and observed runtime cache telemetry are accepted.

validationRows.assertion: RC2 entry points and non-goals are documented.
Dashboard has rows and no fail/tracked-gap rows in the bundled support evidence.
Native frame timing evidence exists, remains candidate/reporting-only, and does not silently become release-blocking.
M85 resource/cache evidence exists, remains reporting-only, and does not claim observed runtime cache telemetry.
M86 fidelity counters are present for RC2 scorecard.
M87 remains a selected live-editing evidence slice and does not claim a new native window run.
Support, expected-unsupported, dependency-gated, implementation-gap, and reporting-only rows are classified.
PM package command, demo script, and release notes are generated.

nonClaims: M88 freezes RC2 packaging and gates; it does not add broad Skia parity.
M88 does not promote frame.kadre-windowed to a release-blocking FPS gate.
M88 does not claim observed WebGPU runtime cache telemetry beyond M85's deterministic ledger.
M88 does not claim broad runtime-effect live controls or dynamic SkSL compilation; WGSL remains the shader implementation target.
M88 does not claim window-surface screenshot/readback support.
